daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but restless—like you're ready to shake things up. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to trust your instincts and stop overthinking. Something small shifts today that matters more than you realize.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Single? Someone's been noticing your energy from the sidelines. Either way, authenticity hits different today. Show up as yourself, not who you think they want.
daily.career: Your ideas have teeth today—people are actually listening. This is your moment to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or speak up in meetings. The universe has your back; step into that quiet confidence you've been building.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Nothing intense needed—just get outside and let your nervous system reset. Listen to what feels good instead of forcing routines that drain you. Rest is also a vibe.

weekly.overview: Your vibe is shifting toward authenticity this week, Taurus. Mercury's energy is pushing you to speak your truth without the usual filter. Trust the momentum—clarity feels good on you right now.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing the real you, and honestly? That's the whole point. Whether you're coupled or single, this is about magnetic honesty. Show up as you are, not as a polished version.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are lowkey sharp this week. That idea you've been sitting on? Worth exploring. The energy supports bold moves that feel grounded, not reckless. Your quiet confidence is your superpower.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for slowness—nourishing meals, actual rest, maybe a walk that feels less like cardio and more like meditation. Tune in to what makes you feel genuinely restored, not just checked off.
